title: Lomariopsis oleandrifolia
taxonomy: Lomariopsis oleandrifolia is classified as a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. This classification is within the phylum Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. At the rank of genus, Lomariopsis is a member of the family Lomariopsidaceae, and at the rank of kingdom, it is classified as Plantae. The species is further classified as a vascular plant, meaning it has a system of vascular tissue for transporting water, nutrients, and sugars. The classification of Lomariopsis oleandrifolia reflects its evolutionary relationships and characteristics as a member of the fern group.

Traditionally, Lomariopsis oleandrifolia has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and respiratory issues.
